perShot.prompt: {character_a} in {scene} with surprised {emotion}, wearing {product_brand} uniform, {style} vlogging style.
{character_b} sitting in {scene}, calm {emotion}, traditional tea set on table, {style} style.
Close-up of {character_b} with sincere {emotion}, talking about education, {style} interview style.
Close-up of {character_b} with awkward but polite {emotion}, nodding, {style} style.
Wide shot of {character_a} and {character_b} in {scene}, thoughtful {emotion}, {style} style.
{character_b} speaking in {scene} with humorous {emotion}, overlaid with meme elements, {style} style.
